name: Production Issue Fixes Knowledge Pack — Source Registry
policy: Sources are REGISTERED REFERENCES compiled from general professional and engineering knowledge for governance and attribution. They are NOT freshly retrieved documents: retrievedUtc is null and exact URLs/text must be independently verified before any citation. The pack contains only ORIGINAL summaries — no verbatim copying of any source. verbatimCopyAllowed is false for every source. Community/forum patterns are registered as topic families, not specific threads; no quotes or copyrighted text are asserted. Firsthand findings are this project's own observations.

sources.title: Microsoft .NET / ASP.NET Core / EF Core official documentation (concept family)
sources.licenseNote: © Microsoft. Docs under Microsoft terms; verbatim reuse limited.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of documented behaviour only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered from general knowledge; verify against current docs for the targeted version.
sources.limitationNote: Behaviour and error sub-statuses change between framework versions; verify for the deployed version.

sources.title: OWASP — application security and secure-configuration guidance (concept family)

sources.title: General developer-community troubleshooting knowledge (topic family — not specific threads)
sources.publisher: Developer community at large (no specific thread reproduced)
sources.licenseNote: No specific post or answer reproduced; original synthesis only.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of widely-reported patterns only.
sources.verificationStatus: Topic family registered for attribution; no quotes, URLs, or copyrighted text asserted. Verify before relying on any specific claim.
sources.limitationNote: Community patterns vary in reliability; confidence scores reflect this and high-risk fixes need verification.

sources.title: LocalAIFactory firsthand project findings (this repository)
sources.licenseNote: Internal observations authored for this project.
sources.verificationStatus: Firsthand observations: clone-retry 'destination exists', ANCM absent on a fresh IIS host, Invoke-WebRequest not sending credentials over HTTP, appcmd attribute-path quirk, and the GroupBy(_ => 1)/large-text page-hang lesson.
sources.limitationNote: Observed in this project's environment; generalize with care to other estates.
